# Manual Override Log

> Every time you manually intervene during trading, log it here.
> Review this log weekly. Patterns reveal bugs, limit adjustments, or missing scenarios.

## Template

```
Date: YYYY-MM-DD
Time: HH:MM IST
What I did: [describe the manual action taken]
Reason: [specific reason — not "gut feeling"]
System state before: [positions, P&L, alerts active]
System state after: [positions, P&L, system halted?]
Was it the right call? [review after market close]
What should the system do automatically next time? [if anything]
```
